overall.description: A cinematic static shot of a grand Gothic dining hall reminiscent of Hogwarts Great Hall, filled with students at long tables. Floating candles illuminate the space alongside warm sunlight streaming through tall stained glass windows. The scene is rendered in a game engine with high-quality lighting and atmospheric effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic great hall with floating candles and house dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation from an upper balcony overlooking the dining hall

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination throughout the hall
large Gothic arched stained glass windows at the far end of the hall casting colored light
massive stone column with carved capital supporting the vaulted ceiling on the right side
row of tall pointed arch windows along the left wall of the hall
lengthy wooden house tables arranged in rows with seated figures dining
reflective stone tile flooring visible on the right side walkway

segments.scene_description: A static elevated view of a magnificent Gothic great hall filled with students seated at long dining tables. Floating candles hang from the vaulted ceiling, casting a warm glow that mixes with afternoon sunlight streaming through the tall stained glass windows at the far end. A massive stone pillar dominates the right foreground while the polished stone floor reflects the ambient light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, elevated perspective of a magnificent Gothic great hall that captures the interplay between magical illumination and natural light. It begins with a wide view of students seated at long dining tables, where floating candles hang from the vaulted ceiling to cast a warm, flickering glow. This ambient light blends seamlessly with the afternoon sunlight streaming through tall stained glass windows at the far end of the hall. The scene is anchored by a massive stone pillar dominating the right foreground, while the polished stone floor reflects the shifting light across the expansive space.
